title: pasania bennettii
intro: Pasania bennettii, also known as Bennett's Ash, is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae. It is a deciduous tree native to the Himalayas, and its wood is valued for its durability and resistance to decay. The medicinal properties of Pasania bennettii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function, and it is often prepared as a decoction or powder for herbal use.
